pi_items.source: Found hardcoded in export_result.sh and task.json instructions
Used as the threshold check in verifier.py logic
export_result.sh explicitly checks for JPEG magic bytes (ffd8ff) and verifier.py scores based on this check

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real multi-frame X-Ray Angiography sample downloaded from Rubo Medical (0002.DCM or 0003.DCM), unless the environment fallback creates synthetic data. The verifier checks that an image was exported to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/annotated_measurement.jpg. The exported file must be a valid JPEG image (confirmed via magic bytes in export_result.sh) and must be at least 10240 bytes (10KB) in size.
